entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop species Arachis hypogaea L. being evaluated for yield and growth processes.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total production of the crop, used as a performance measure.

entities.name: CROP GROWTH RATE
entities.description: The rate at which the crop grows, denoted as C in the study.

entities.name: PARTITIONING TO REPRODUCTIVE SINKS
entities.description: The allocation of resources to reproductive organs, denoted as p.

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The application of water to the crop to vary water availability.

entities.name: SOWING DATE
entities.description: The date of planting used to vary water availability throughout the crop's life.

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: The deficiency of water available to the crop, affecting its growth and yield.

entities.name: GRAIN FILLING PHASE
entities.description: The specific growth stage of the crop where seeds are filled.

entities.name: SAHELIAN REGION
entities.description: A drought-prone region where specific groundnut genotypes are adapted.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall leading to water shortage.

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Environmental heat levels that may influence genotype performance.

entities.name: HUMIDITY
entities.description: The amount of water vapor in the air affecting genotype performance.

entities.name: CANOPY TEMPERATURE RELATIVE TO AIR
entities.description: The difference between the crop canopy temperature and the ambient air temperature, denoted as CATD.
